headline: How The Evolving Investment Story Is Shaping Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation Targets
summary: Phillips 66’s assessed fair value has been lifted from US$165.45 to US$179.10, an increase of roughly 8% that brings the model closer to higher pricing assumptions seen across recent Street work. This move sits alongside a wave of refreshed research in which many banks are raising targets while still flagging risks tied to commodity exposure, refining conditions and crude trade flows. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives may shape the way you track Phillips...
